meaning: n.西拉(基督教<<圣经·诗篇>>中一意义不明的希伯来词,大概是咏唱时指明休止的用语)
examples: Selah. Thou didst cleave the earth with rivers.
The LORD of hosts, he is the King of glory. Selah.
Glorious things are spoken of thee, o city of God. Selah.
Selah has had over 8, 000 visitors in recent years, and he relishes showing off his land.
